book.Title: {{rainbow|Moon King}} {{r|fever}}
book.page: There is only one =subject.uD_RegalTitle=, and it is me!!
Oh ho! A pretender =subject.uD_RegalTitle= come for my crown?!
I must save Qud! If you will not join me, then you stand in my way!!
You must help me find a {{C|trinket}}! Quickly, give me all of your belongings!!
